rulebook_urls.label: Sea Salt & Paper: Extra Salt — Official Rules (EN)

chunks.title: Extra Salt: Setup Changes
chunks.content:
## Shuffling In the New Cards

Extra Salt adds **8 new cards** to the game. During setup, shuffle all 8 new cards together with the standard 58-card deck before building the central draw pile.

- No other setup steps change.
- No new tokens, boards, or player components are added.
- Discard pile formation and starting hand size remain identical to the base game.

chunks.title: New Cards — Effects & Scoring
chunks.content:
## New Cards (Extra Salt Expansion)

Shuffle all 8 expansion cards into the standard deck during setup.

| Card | Scoring | Effect When Played |
|---|---|---|
| Jellyfish | 1 pt per Swimmer + Jellyfish combination you have in front of you | On opposing players' **next turn**, they may only draw the top card of the deck — they cannot take from a discard pile |
| Lobster | 1 pt per Lobster + Crab combination you have in front of you | Draw the top 5 cards from the deck; keep 1, return the other 4 to the **bottom** of the deck, then shuffle it |
| Starfish | +2 pts added to the Duo it joins (trio scores **3 pts** total) | See **Trio** rule below — does not trigger the Duo's normal effect |
| Seahorse | Counts as one card in a Collector set (Shell / Octopus / Penguin / Sailor) of your choice | You must already have at least 1 card of the chosen collection; cannot exceed that collection's printed maximum |
| Basket of Crabs | 1 pt per Crab card you have in front of you | *(Passive multiplier — played to tableau, no immediate action effect. Does **not** count as a Crab card itself.)* |

> **Lobster scoring note:** The standalone Lobster card scores via pairing with any Crab card you have — distinct from the base-game *Crab + Lobster* duo effect.

chunks.title: Trio Rule (Starfish)
chunks.content:
## Trio Rule

A **Trio** is formed when a player holds a matched **Duo** pair plus a **Starfish** card.

- Place all three cards in front of you as a group.
- The trio scores **3 points total** (the Duo's base 1 pt/pair + 2 pts from the Starfish).
- **The Duo's normal effect is cancelled** — you do not draw, steal, search, or take another turn.
- A Starfish can only be combined with a Duo pair, not with a single card.

chunks.title: New Duo Effects That Change Turn Actions
chunks.content:
## New Duo Effects That Alter Turn Actions

Three expansion cards introduce changes to what players can do on their turn.

### Jellyfish — Restricts Opponents' Draw Step

When you play a Jellyfish duo, each opposing player's **next Step 1 (Draw)** is restricted:

- They **may only draw the top card from the deck** (Option A).
- They **may not take from either discard pile** (Option B is unavailable).

This lasts for their immediately following turn only.

### Lobster — New Draw Action as a Duo Effect

When you play a Lobster duo (Lobster + Crab), resolve the following as the duo's effect:

1. Take the **top 5 cards** from the deck.
2. **Keep 1** and add it to your hand.
3. Return the other 4 to the **bottom** of the deck, then shuffle it.

### Starfish — Trio Formation (New Option in Step 2)

During Step 2, if you hold **one Starfish card plus a matching Duo pair**, you may form a **trio** instead of a normal duo:

| Formation | Cards | Points | Effect |
|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| Standard duo | 2 matching cards | 1 pt | Duo effect triggers |
| Trio (Starfish) | Duo pair + 1 Starfish | 3 pts total | **Duo effect is cancelled** |

chunks.title: Extra Salt: New Scoring Sources
chunks.content:
## Extra Salt: New Scoring Sources

All five new card types introduce VP sources not present in the base game.

| Card | Scoring Rule | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Jellyfish** | +1 pt per Swimmer + Jellyfish pair in front of you | Each matched pair = 1 pt |
| **Lobster** | +1 pt per Lobster + Crab pair in front of you | Each matched pair = 1 pt |
| **Starfish** | Adds 2 pts to any Duo card, forming a Trio worth 3 pts total | Cancels the Duo card's normal effect |
| **Seahorse** | Acts as a wild for one Collector card (Octopus, Shell, Penguin, or Sailor) | Must already have ≥1 card of that collection; cannot exceed the Collector's max printed score |
| **Basket of Crabs** | +1 pt per Crab card you have in front of you | Does not count as a Crab card itself |
